title: [RSO_Call for Proposals_October 21, 2024] Ministry of Housing and Urban-Rural Development – Research | Duke Kunshan University
text:
[RSO_Call for Proposals_October 21, 2024] Ministry of Housing and Urban-Rural Development
Ministry of Housing and Urban-Rural Development (住建部) is calling for proposals for the Key Special Program on “Critical Technologies and Equipment for Sustainable Urban Development” 城镇可持续发展关键技术与装备重点专项.
You could visit the official website for more information: 国家科技管理信息系统公共服务平台. Please log in to your personal account to see the relevant project application guidelines. If you do not have an account yet, please contact the RSO, and we can help you create one.
Budget Total: A total of 28 directions are planned to be launched, categorized into key technology and application demonstration categories, with approximately 539 Million RMB allocated from the national budget.
Priority Areas and Goals:
To achieve sustainable economic, social, and ecological development in urban areas, efforts will be focused on enhancing technological supply in six key areas:Spatial Optimization 空间优化Quality Improvement 品质提升Smart Operations and Maintenance 智慧运维Green Empowerment 绿色赋能Intelligent Construction 智能建造Low-carbon Transition 低碳转型
Spatial Optimization 空间优化
Quality Improvement 品质提升
Smart Operations and Maintenance 智慧运维
Green Empowerment 绿色赋能
Intelligent Construction 智能建造
Low-carbon Transition 低碳转型
The goal is to provide an innovative technological system that supports improving the functionality and quality of cities and buildings, and achieving green, low-carbon, and sustainable development in China.
Project Period: the project implementation period generally does not exceed 3 years.
Requirements:
Submit the applications through 国家科技管理信息系统公共服务平台. Clearly explain the project’s objectives, evaluation metrics, innovative approach, technical roadmap, and research foundation. Ensure that the project application form and attachments are fully completed according to the specified format requirements.
The applications should include relevant agreements and commitments. The leading organization must sign a joint application agreement with all participating organizations.
The proposal needs to be nominated by Jiangsu Department of Science and Technology.
For other information, please visit the website for more details: 国家科技管理信息系统公共服务平台.
Eligibility:
PI must have the title of professor/associate professor/principal researcher scientist or a doctoral degree (高级职称或博士学位).
PI should be born after January 1st, 1964 (under 60 years old). The annual working time dedicated to the project should be no less than 6 months.
PI shall be the proposer of the main research concept and the scientific personnel who leads the research projects.
Experts involved in drafting the implementation plan of key projects or this year’s project guidelines are not allowed to apply for this project.
For specific application requirements, please refer to each application guidelines. In case with special provisions, those provisions shall apply.
Language: Chinese
Internal Deadline: 12:00 pm, Wednesday, November 27th, 2024
If you are interested in applying for this funding opportunity, please submit your proposals via MOST system by the internal deadline.
